Name: Two Body Problem
Description:
Range: 4
Target: One character in range and a second character within 4
who shares a row or column with the first target
Effect: Propel one or both targets closer to each other along the line until
they are adjacent or until they collide with another character or
terrain +2 or more above their starting position
Succeed: You may deal up to **2**$^a$ **Fatigue** split however you wish between
the targets and any other character they collided with
Critical: You may cause one$^b$ of the targets to become **Dazed**
Upgrade a: Add half your POW to the Fatigue you deal on a Success
Upgrade b: You may apply **Dazed** to one target on a Success or both targets on a Critical

Name: Vector Field
Description:
Range: 4
Target: Area **2**$^a$
Effect: Indicate a side or corner of the area. Whenever a character moves
into any space in the area they are pushed one space toward
the indicated side or corner unless they spend **1**$^b$ additional
movement to resist this effect. Movement triggered by this effect
does not trigger this effect.
Upgrade a: Add half your REA to the size of the Area
Upgrade b: Add 1 to the additional movement cost

Name: Accelerate
Description:
Range: 4
Target: One Ally or Self
Effect: Target is **Hastened**
Upgrade a: You may apply the effect to a second target
Upgrade b:
After using this ability, you gain the benefit of the **Dodge** Basic Stance
until the start of your next turn (in addition to your actual Stance)

Name: Orthogonal Incidence
Description:
Trigger: You are targeted with an ability that inflicts Fatigue or Stress
by an enemy sharing a row or column with your position and at least 3 spaces away
Effect: Add your Kineticism Training Level to your Defense roll and end this stance
Critical: Apply the effect to a new target sharing a row or column with you
which is at a right angle to the row or column you share with the
triggering enemy (but reduce the Fatigue or Stress dealt by 1)$^b$
Upgrade a: Gain an additional bonus to the Defense roll equal to half your REA
Upgrade b: The target takes the full impact of the effect on a Critical

Name: Eigencomplex
Description:
Effect: Gain **Aura** **1**$^a$ and indicate an orientation: clockwise or counterclockwise.
Whenever a character moves into any space in the aura, they are pushed one space
in a cardinal direction in the indicated orientation unless they spend
an extra space of movement to resist this effect. Movement triggered by this effect
does not trigger this effect. You cannot be targeted by enemies in this aura
unless they are orthogonally adjacent to you.
Upgrade a: Increase the size of the Aura by half your REA
Upgrade b:
Ranged attacks targeting you from 3 or more spaces away are at **+1 Bane**
while you are in this Stance

Name: Relay
Description:
Effect: Allies may bounce abilities off of your space as if they were originating
from you. You must be in range of their ability and they must have
an unobstructed path to you.
Upgrade a: Abilities bounced off of you may ignore Cover
Upgrade b:
When an ability is bounced off of you you may move 1 before the attack.
Use your new position to determine whether the target is in range.

Name: Newtonian Mechanics
Description:
Effect: Whenever you target a creature or area with an ability using an action,
you may move yourself **1**$^a$ spaces further away from that creature
(or from the closest space in the area).
Upgrade a: Increase the distance you move by half your REA
Upgrade b:
You may move the target 1 as well in the opposite direction you move, |
after the ability resolves (in addition to any movement the ability applies normally)
